title: ColdCraft
description: This modapck is the one use in Niko's "Minecraft's Coldest World" Series
body:
![ColdCraft Front Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea0946eaa456438574665440214273edc852268.jpeg)

**ColdCraft is a Modpack intended to make Minecraft a harsh but fun winter landscape**

In this modpack, there are some extereme survival problems to deal with such as termparature and dehydration. 

In addition there are also fun winter additions such as Gingerbread Men mobs that live in Gingerbread houses as well as sleds to ride in the snow and more

Food can be a bit hard to come by but it's more than possible to find mobs. Crops might be a bit harder since there are no villages but you can always kill zombies

In a nutshell, this modpack is designed to give you a winter challenge with some other fun stuff.


**This is the official modpack for niko's _"Minecraft's Coldest World"_  series.**

## IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE MODPACK TO WORK

**To make sure you get the winter world, you need to follow the instructions for the [Instructions](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-age-frozen-world) for the Ice age Mod as you won't get a frozen world otherwise**

## Mods that are included but are turned off by default

### Primal Winter ###

WARNING this mod turns frost into a frozen wasteland and will basically make things 10 times harder and unpleasant, I don't recommend turning it on unless you like pain

### Limited Lives ###

It's in the name, this mod allows for a slightly less hardcore mode. Use the config if you want to play this way

### Flashback ###

This mod is for creating cinematics shots, unless you plan to make content with this modpack you won't really have a need for it but it's there if you want to use it
